metadata.title:
BIG WRECK ON


GREAT NORTHERN

tablishing a free employment bureau


Agencies Roasted.

pages.raw_text:
The matter was Lrou Int to the at
tention of the trades council by c. A.
Foster, who grilled the employment
agencies numerically Mr.. Foster
said:


''You have all noticed the exposure
of the vicious practices of the en-
ployment agencies which has been
made in The Spokane Press. We
have all known that these agencies
were dens of vice where crooked deal
ing flourished, but we, and the public
at large, did not know of the depths
of infamy into which they had sunk.
This exposure has been fearlessly
made by The Spokane Press. We now
have chance to help this paper in
it's fight against these human mon
sters and we should give The Press
our undivided support


The speech was warmly received
and President Martin appointed the
following committee to appear before
the city council: c. A. Foster, j. II.
Brill and J. II. Stevens. The commit
tee went to the city hall, but the
council had adjourned.


Resolutions adopted by the trades
council appear elsewhere.
